escalation.rationale: Active US-Iran war continues with fragile ceasefire ending, Trump threatens military action, oil spikes, and NATO cohesion weakening.

ticker_items: Trump says won't extend Iran ceasefire, oil jumps 3%
Japan lifts lethal weapons export ban amid regional threats
US pauses arms deliveries to Europe due to Iran war
Iran warns of 'new cards' as ceasefire talks stall
NATO interest in Iran conflict 'very limited' - Norway

eastern_europe.description: Russian strikes across four regions wounded over 25 people overnight
Russian overnight strikes across four Ukrainian regions wounded 25 people.

middle_east.description: Israeli forces destroying villages in occupied buffer zone areas
Israeli strikes killed at least four people in Lebanon and wounded journalists.

claimed_totals.figure: 3,375 in Iran, 2,294 in Lebanon, 28 in Gulf states

claimed_totals.claim: Total deaths from US-Israel attacks on Iran
Total deaths in Lebanon from conflict

russia.text: Russian envoy Aleksey Dedov has accused the US and Israel of committing war crimes in Iran following strikes on medical and civilian infrastructure in Tehran
russia.speaker: Aleksey Dedov
russia.title: Russian envoy

middle_east.text: The United States and Iran both warn they are ready for war as a ceasefire deadline approaches
middle_east.speaker: Unknown
middle_east.title: Official statement

middle_east.text: Naim Qassem will destroy Lebanon and pay with his head
middle_east.speaker: Israel Katz
middle_east.title: Defense Minister

middle_east.text: The Yemeni armed forces will return to fighting if a fragile ceasefire that halted 40 days of American-Israeli aggression against Iran expires without an agreement
middle_east.speaker: Abdul-Malik al-Houthi
middle_east.title: Ansarullah leader

middle_east.text: This is indeed the biggest crisis in history
middle_east.speaker: Fatih Birol
middle_east.title: IEA Director-General

middle_east.text: no single country can now protect its own peace and security alone
middle_east.speaker: Sanae Takaichi
middle_east.title: Japanese Prime Minister

observers.description: Pro-Russian former president Rumen Radev wins parliamentary election in landslide victory. His center-left coalition emerged as clear winner, potentially pushing the EU and NATO member closer to Moscow. Radev had stepped down as president in January to run for parliament.

Parliament approves scrapping ban on lethal weapons exports, clearing final hurdles for postwar arms sales. The approval will facilitate future sales of next-generation fighter jets and combat drones. Move represents significant shift in Japan's pacifist defense posture.

Serving as mediator for US-Iran peace talks in Islamabad as ceasefire deadline approaches. White House reports VP JD Vance ready to fly back to Islamabad while Iran has not confirmed participation. Pakistan brokered the original ceasefire that took effect earlier.
Russia's interior minister visits Pyongyang to discuss law enforcement ties. New road bridge connecting countries set to open this summer, strengthening bilateral cooperation amid sanctions.
Norwegian minister states NATO's interest in Iran conflict is 'very limited,' suggesting alliance preference for diplomatic solutions over military involvement.
US paused HIMARS deliveries to Estonia due to Iran war demands on weapons stocks. This highlights NATO vulnerability and growing tensions within the alliance over resource allocation.

financial.notes: Oil prices climbed 3% after Trump said he won't extend Iran ceasefire, with Brent rising to $97.96 and WTI to $93.15.

update_log.text: Trump approval rating falls to 32%, matching Carter-era lows amid Iran war confusion.
Oil prices surge 3% as Trump signals no ceasefire extension with Iran.
Japan announces end to lethal weapons export ban in major policy shift.
Israeli strikes in Lebanon kill four, wound journalists in at-Tiri.
US pauses HIMARS deliveries to Estonia due to Iran war weapons demands.
Trump extends US-Iran ceasefire unilaterally as Wednesday deadline looms with talks stalled
Russian strikes across Ukraine wound 25+ people in four regions overnight
Houthis threaten return to war if US-Israel aggression against Iran resumes
IEA chief warns Iran war causing biggest energy crisis in history
Trump extends US-Iran ceasefire until Iran presents proposal and talks conclude
Iran holds military parades in Tehran as original ceasefire deadline approached
French UNIFIL soldier killed in ambush while clearing explosives in southern Lebanon
Bulgaria's pro-Russian ex-president Radev wins parliamentary election by landslide
